what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset named p-11 in the capital-raise folder, providing YAML metadata and a source ground-truth note.
observations: YAML frontmatter contains id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, source, author_session, created, and links fields.
The asset is an image/jpeg with a blob reference blob://b2:a8631c3e111afcb6ac21dd81753ea18c.
Width and height are both recorded as 0.
The body states 'SOURCE design ground-truth — capital-raise/p-11.jpg'.
standouts: Width and height are 0 despite being an image record.
The blob is referenced by a content-addressable hash.
The source field is set to design_source_material.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for ledger metadata.
Uses an image://design-source URI scheme for the address.
References binary content via a blob:// hash.
Categorizes provenance with a source field.
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting missing or unextracted image dimensions.
The empty links array leaves the asset unconnected to other ledger entries.
notes: A metadata stub for a capital-raise design image with unresolved dimensions and no outgoing links.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
Is the empty links array intentional or simply not yet populated?
What file size or checksum details does the blob reference represent?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is a SOURCE design ground-truth image record; the actual content is a metadata stub that aligns with that purpose but lacks image dimension data.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to register a design-source image asset in the channel-memory ledger so it can serve as ground truth for capital-raise materials.
contribution: Provides a stable id, address, blob reference, and provenance metadata for a design-source image, enabling retrieval and future linking even though dimensions are currently missing.
summary_for_embedding: Ledger metadata record for a JPEG design-source image named capital-raise/p-11 with id, blob reference, author session, and zero width/height.
intention_for_embedding: To catalog a design-source image asset as ground truth for capital-raise materials.
